title: Orders
description: Review orders, payment status, and fulfillment progress.

detail.shellDescription: Review merchant-scoped customer, delivery, payment, fulfillment, and total details for this order.
detail.notFoundDesc: This order could not be found for the selected merchant context.
detail.loadErrorDesc: The dashboard could not load this order. Refresh the page or try again later.
detail.noItems: No line items on this order.
detail.paymentHelpSummary: Payment is separate from packing and handoff.
detail.paymentHelpBody: Cash sales are marked paid when you receive the money. Online (Chapa) usually updates automatically; use Re-check if it looks stuck.
detail.name: Name

table.emptyMessage: No orders yet. Create one or wait for storefront sales.
table.filteredEmptyMessage: No orders match these filters. Try clearing filters or searching for another order code, name, or phone.
table.noPhonesSelected: No phone numbers on the selected orders.

create.title: Create order
create.description: Capture a phone or in-person cash sale. Choose a customer, add products, then confirm delivery.
create.existingCustomerDesc: Search your shop customers and reuse their profile.
create.newCustomerDesc: Enter email and details — we create a Customers profile.
create.customerNotFound: Can't find them? Switch to new customer and enter their email.
create.emailDesc: Required. Creates or links a customer in this shop.
create.productsDesc: Select one or more options, then set quantities for this order.
create.reviewDesc: Confirm customer and items, then add delivery details for this cash order.
create.shippingAddressDesc: Country is always Ethiopia for local delivery.
create.countryFixed: Fixed for this shop's delivery zone.
create.notePlaceholder: Optional — cash collection notes, delivery timing, WhatsApp thread…
create.toastError: Could not create this order. Check details and try again.

actions.noFurther: No further steps for this order.
actions.confirmCancelBody: This permanently cancels the sale. Only do this if the order will not go ahead.
actions.confirmFinishBody: Runs every open step at once so you don't click through one by one:
actions.confirmMarkPaidBody: Record that you received payment for this order.
actions.confirmRecheckBody: Ask Chapa if this online payment went through, then update the order.
actions.markReadyDesc: Pack the items so they are ready for delivery or pickup.
actions.markCompletedDesc: Customer has the order (delivered or picked up).
actions.markPaidDesc: Record that you received the cash for this order.
actions.allDoneDesc: No further steps for this order.
actions.errFulfillable: Couldn't pack this order. Products may not share this shop's delivery profile — try re-saving the product or contact support.
actions.errFulfillmentNotFound: Could not find a package to update.
actions.errInventory: Stock location isn't set up for packing yet.
